name: ableton-camera-video
description: Place the latest ableton-camera recording below a selected arrangement take.

scripts.package: npm run build:production && extensions-cli package -o dist/ableton-camera-video.ablx
scripts.start: tsx build.ts && extensions-cli run --live "/Applications/Ableton Live 12 Beta.app"
scripts.start:suite: tsx build.ts && extensions-cli run --live "/Applications/Ableton Live 12 Suite.app"
